bulk.title: Bulk Add Cards
bulk.desc: Enter one card per line in the format:
bulk.noValid: No valid cards found. Each line must be: question, answer[, context]

csv.title: Import CSV
csv.desc: The CSV must have {question} and {answer} columns. An optional {context} column can also be included.

prompts.title: AI Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Use these prompts to generate flashcards with artificial intelligence. Fill in the fields and copy the ready-to-use prompt.

generalFlashcards.name: General Flashcards
generalFlashcards.text:
Generate 20 flashcards about [TOPIC].

CSV format with 3 columns:
question, answer, context.

The question should assess knowledge.
The answer should be short.
The context should briefly explain or give an example.

Do not add text outside the CSV.

vocabularyFlashcards.name: Vocabulary Flashcards
vocabularyFlashcards.text:
Generate 30 flashcards to learn [LANGUAGE OR VOCABULARY TOPIC].

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

The question should be the word or phrase.
The answer should be the translation.
The context should be an example sentence.

Return only the CSV.

studyQuestions.name: Study Questions
studyQuestions.text:
Create 25 study questions about [TOPIC].

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

The question should be clear.
The answer brief.
The context should explain the answer.

Deliver only the CSV.

basicConcepts.name: Basic Concepts
basicConcepts.text:
Generate 20 flashcards to learn the basic concepts of [TOPIC].

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

Use simple language.
The context should include a simple example.

Do not include text outside the CSV.

rulesFormulas.name: Rules and Formulas
rulesFormulas.text:
Create 20 flashcards to study rules or formulas of [TOPIC].

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

The answer should contain the formula or rule.
The context should show how it is used.

Deliver only the CSV.

quickMemorization.name: Quick Memorization
quickMemorization.text:
Generate 30 quick memorization flashcards about [TOPIC].

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

The answer should be very short.
The context should help recall the answer.

Do not add additional text.

comparisons.name: Comparisons
comparisons.text:
Generate 20 flashcards comparing concepts of [TOPIC].

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

The question should ask for a difference or comparison.
The answer should be brief.
The context should clarify the comparison.

Return CSV only.

progressiveDifficulty.name: Progressive Difficulty
progressiveDifficulty.text:
Generate 25 flashcards about [TOPIC] ordered from easy to hard.

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

The first ones should be basic.
The last ones more advanced.

Deliver only the CSV.

fillBlanks1.name: Fill in the Blanks (1)
fillBlanks1.text:
Generate 20 fill-in-the-blank flashcards about [TOPIC].

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

Rules:
- The question must have a blank space using _____
- The answer must be ONLY one word.
- The context must be a sentence that helps understand the answer.

Deliver only the CSV.

fillBlanks2.name: Fill in the Blanks (2)
fillBlanks2.text:
Create 20 fill-in-the-blank flashcards about [TOPIC].

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

Rules:
- The question must be a definition with a blank _____
- The answer must be a single word.
- The context must provide a brief explanation.

Deliver only CSV.

fillBlanks3.name: Fill in the Blanks (3)
fillBlanks3.text:
Generate 30 fill-in-the-blank flashcards to memorize [TOPIC].

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

Rules:
- Use a blank space _____ in the question.
- The answer must be a single word.
- The context should help recall the answer.

Return CSV only.

everydayVocabulary.name: Everyday Vocabulary
everydayVocabulary.text:
Generate 40 everyday vocabulary flashcards translating words from [LANGUAGE 1] to [LANGUAGE 2].

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

Rules:
- Individual words only.
- Do not use phrases.
- The answer must be a single word.

Deliver only the CSV.

everydayVerbs.name: Everyday Verbs
everydayVerbs.text:
Generate 30 everyday verb flashcards translating from [LANGUAGE 1] to [LANGUAGE 2].

CSV format:
question, answer, context.

Rules:
- The question must be a verb in the infinitive.
- The answer must be its translation in a single word.
- The context must be a short sentence using the verb.

Return only the CSV.
